Control who can see model redirection de: Control who can see model redirection details in usage logs.
Error rate threshold (0-1), e.g. 0.8 mea: Error rate threshold (0-1), e.g. 0.8 means 80% error rate
Minimum number of requests in the time w: Minimum number of requests in the time window before checking error rate
Notify administrators when a channel exp: Notify administrators when a channel experiences consecutive errors or high error rates.
Number of consecutive errors before send: Number of consecutive errors before sending an alert
OneBot v11 HTTP API address. Compatible: OneBot v11 HTTP API address. Compatible with go-cqhttp, NapCat, Lagrange, etc.
Optional. Used for webhook signature ver: Optional. Used for webhook signature verification.
Send notification when a channel error r: Send notification when a channel error rate exceeds threshold within the time window
Send notification when a channel reaches: Send notification when a channel reaches consecutive error threshold
Time window for calculating error rate: Time window for calculating error rate
